scenes.text:
The King does not look up when you enter. His crown is upside-down on the table.
The spymaster was found that morning — no wounds, no marks, a scream frozen on his face.

"Elara was taken last night from her chambers. No body. No ransom. The wizard felt a door open somewhere else."

He slides three things across the table.

  1. A signet ring — opens any door in the kingdom
  2. A pouch of gold
  3. A sealed letter from the spymaster

"Find her. Come back without her, and I won’t need to execute you."

choices.text: Take the ring. Ride for the Wastes.
Take the gold. Visit the city underworld.
Ask the wizard about the letter.
Find the castle captain for men.
